Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction: this PR adds a new read-only command. Source inspection confirms current main lacks the requested command and inline-suggestion request mode.

target.title: feat(docs): list pending suggestions
target.body:
Closes #876.

## Summary

- add `gog docs suggestions list <docId> [--tab title-or-id]`
- request `SUGGESTIONS_INLINE` explicitly and emit pending text insertions/deletions with suggestion ID, segment, UTF-16 range, and text
- combine contiguous runs, preserve nested suggestion IDs, and traverse tables, table-of-contents content, headers, footers, and footnotes
- add stable JSON/TSV output, generated command references and service-skill metadata, user docs, changelog, and focused regressions

Style-only suggestions and accept/reject mutation remain intentionally out of scope. The Docs API response does not expose suggestion authors.

## Proof

- `make ci`
- `go test -race ./internal/cmd -run 'Test(DocsSuggestions|EnumerateDocsSuggestions)' -count=1`
- built binary authenticated smoke against a disposable Google Doc using the dedicated test account: default and explicit-tab inline reads passed; temporary files trashed
- source-blind behavior validation: help, invalid ID, empty JSON/plain read, tab selection, and unknown-tab failure passed
- focused fixtures cover pending insertions/deletions, nested IDs, contiguous grouping, tables, non-body segments, exact request query parameters, tab projection, JSON, and TSV escaping
- pre-commit and exact-head autoreview: clean; no actionable findings

## Live-proof gap

Google's Docs API can read but cannot create a pending suggestion. The existing-profile Chrome bridge was unavailable, so an authenticated document containing a real pending insertion/deletion could not be created safely. The exact pending-change rendering path is therefore fixture-proven but awaits either a live fixture or an explicit maintainer waiver before merge.
target.author: steipete
